day3_night_start.name: Me
day3_night_start.text: *Back home. Lying in bed, but sleep won't come.*

day3_night_phone_2.name: Me
day3_night_phone_2.text: *Sea: '{name}, today was fun! Let's walk together tomorrow too♥'*

day3_night_phone_3.name: Me
day3_night_phone_3.text:
*Sea: 'Reply before you sleep'*
*Sea: '...'*
*Sea: '{name}?'*
*Sea: 'Why aren't you reading?'*
*Sea: 'You're just sleeping... right?'*

day3_night_phone_4.name: Me
day3_night_phone_4.text: *...5 messages in 13 minutes. I flipped the phone face-down.*

day3_night_recall.name: Me
day3_night_recall.text: *Going over today's events. The scratched locker. Yuna's memory card. The locked rooftop door.*

day3_night_recall_2.name: Me
day3_night_recall_2.text: *Three days since I transferred. Yuna said transfer students 'disappeared' from this school.*

day3_night_recall_3.name: Me
day3_night_recall_3.text: *...Strange. My memories from before transferring here are... hazy. Why did I come to this school again?*

day3_night_recall_4.name: Me
day3_night_recall_4.text: *My parents? When did I last contact... when was the last time I talked to them? I can't... remember.*

day3_night_stat_crack.name: Me
day3_night_stat_crack.text: *...Something is wrong. This feeling isn't 'affection'. It's...*

day3_night_nightmare.name: Me
day3_night_nightmare.text: *...Did I fall asleep? This is... the school? It's dark.*

day3_night_nightmare_2.name: Me
day3_night_nightmare_2.text: *Walking down the corridor. Only my footsteps echo. Classroom doors stand open, one by one.*

day3_night_nightmare_4.name: Me
day3_night_nightmare_4.text: *I looked behind me. Nobody there. ...But I can hear laughter.*

day3_night_nightmare_5.text: "...I'll protect you. Don't go anywhere. Don't... go... anywhere..."

day3_night_nightmare_6.name: Me
day3_night_nightmare_6.text: *I started running. The corridor stretches endlessly. Heels clicking behind me, getting closer.*

day3_night_nightmare_7.text: "It won't hurt. It won't hurt. It won't hurt. Itwonthurtitwonthurtitwont..."

day3_night_nightmare_8.name: Me
day3_night_nightmare_8.text: *Dead end. I turn around... Three shadows standing there. Smiling.*

day3_night_seolhwa_2.name: Lee Seolhwa
day3_night_seolhwa_2.text: "One year ago... I came here just like you."

day3_night_seolhwa_3.name: Lee Seolhwa
day3_night_seolhwa_3.text: "Don't trust them. Five days. You have to get out... within five days."

day3_night_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day3_night_seolhwa_4.text: *Seolhwa's figure fades. The words 'five days' echo in my mind.*

day3_night_wakeup.name: Me
day3_night_wakeup.text: *...! I woke up. Drenched in cold sweat.*

day3_night_wakeup_2.name: Me
day3_night_wakeup_2.text: *A dream...? The name Seolhwa. It was definitely on the attendance sheet... no, it wasn't.*

day3_night_wakeup_3.name: Me
day3_night_wakeup_3.text: *'Get out within five days.' ...From this school? ...Or from all of this?*

day3_night_investigate.name: Me
day3_night_investigate.text: *I can't look away anymore. Yuna's memory card, the documents, the missing transfer students... I need to connect everything.*

day3_night_investigate_2.name: Me
day3_night_investigate_2.text: *Starting tomorrow, things change. I'll expose this school's true face.*

day3_night_deny.name: Me
day3_night_deny.text: *...It was just a dream. Everything will be fine by morning.*

day3_night_deny_2.name: Me
day3_night_deny_2.text: *I pulled the blanket over myself and closed my eyes.*
